feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: #CoE#QDGG Business function only available on 3SL.
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

could you please provide a list of business function features which is only available on 3SL instead of 2SL.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud enables user-based authorization control for sales price by products
entry.content:
Dear expert,

Please advise how to implement the following requirements in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud enables user-based authorization control, allowing sales staff to access only sales prices, pricing condition, sales orders and analytics reports of products they are responsible for.

In our scenario, two sales users belong to the same sales organization and are assigned the same business role.

Sales staff A is responsible for Material 1, while Sales staff B is responsible for Material 2.

Sales A shall only be authorized to edit/view the sales price of Material 1 and shall not have access to the price of Material 2.

Best regards,

Joey

entry.title: [S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition] Custom Currency Code for Separate Exchange Rate Management - Feasibil
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have a question regarding currency and exchange rate configuration in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

**Current Situation (ECC)**
- We have two company codes: one in the US and one in Hong Kong
- Both use USD as the document currency
- However, they need to apply different exchange rates for USD→JPY conversion
- In our current ECC system, we created a custom currency code (e.g., "USDA") to manage separate exchange rates for the Hong Kong entity

**Questions for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition**
I would like to understand the feasibility and best practices for this requirement:

1. **Can we create custom currency codes (like "USDA") in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?**
- Is this supported via standard configuration or key user extensibility?

2. **If custom currency codes are supported, can we maintain separate exchange rate tables for them?**
- Can we configure exchange rates for the custom currency code independently from the standard USD?

3. **Are there any functional limitations or restrictions when using custom currency codes?**
- Are there any standard apps, processes, or integration scenarios that do not support custom currency codes?
- Any known issues with reporting, intercompany transactions, or payment processing?

4. **Is there an alternative standard approach recommended by SAP for this scenario?**
- For example, using different currency types or other configuration options?

Any guidance or documentation references would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: best-priced items in Compare Supplier Quotation app
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I have some question about the determination logic in best-priced items app Compare Supplier Quotation.

In SAP Help document related to this app (Compare Supplier Quotations | SAP Help Portal) Items with the lowest price are displayed as best-priced items. Any other factors such as supplier evaluation score, are not included in the calculation.

I want to ask this logic to community members.

1) I created RFQs with three item
R001 10EA, R002 10EA, R003 10EA with same delivery date.

2) I created Supplier Quotation with Supplier A with
R001, 9EA, 950/EA for price
R002, 10EA, 1000/EA for price
R003, 10EA, 1050/EA for price

3) Also, created Supplier Quotation with Supplier B with

R001, 10EA, 970/EA for price

R002, 10EA, 1000/EA for price

R003, 10EA, 1030/EA for price.

4) Only concerns the price for item level, the best-priced items will be 2(950 and 1000) for Supplier A and 2(1000, 1030) for Supplier B.
But in my system, best-priced items for supplier quotation A is 1 and best-priced items for supplier quotation B is 3

5) Determination logic for best-priced items concern it is fully delivered or not?

Kindly help any advice if have knowledge about this issue.
Best Regards,

entry.title: My Purchase Requisition becomes Advance license
entry.content:
Dear Sir / Madam, We are using My purchase requisition App in business catalogue 

SAP_MM_BC_SSPPR_MANAGE_PC  which was self service , but now we notice that become in Advance category.  So in which app we create purchase requisition with Self service category.

 

Thanks and regards 

Senthil

entry.title: Is PO Creation via RAP (EML) using I_PURCHASEORDERTP_2 Possible in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, is it possible to create Purchase Orders through a RAP application using EML by consuming the standard business object interface I_PURCHASEORDERTP_2, based on data received from an external system (e.g., via Excel upload)?

Please let me know if this approach is supported or not.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: BADI for Billing document Item Custom Field
entry.content:
Basically, we are facing two challenges with billing document Item.

1) we have added few custom fields at item level, now we want to fill data via BADI while saving billing Document, but we are not able to find any relevant BADI for the same.

2) we want to validate few fields at the time of saving billing Doc, again not able to find BADI for the same

entry.title: 100558 - Map Format Data for Payments: User-Defined Field (Format CH_CGI_XML_CT) #COE#RFL01
entry.content:
Hello,

Actually I'm having trouble understanding what the User-Defined Field are for.

I work on a custo mapping based on CH_CGI_XML_CT. I try to understand how tag <BldgNb> works.

It was redefined with a source and a condition which refered to User-Defined Field.

>> Source : FPAYHX-REF02

>> Condition : FPAYHX-REF14

But I didn't find any document which helps explain what these fields correspond to in SAP.

I find the note https://me.sap.com/notes/2820775

But I didn't find information about FPAYHX-REF02 or FPAYHX-REF14.

I work on SAP public cloud and I don't any access to SAP ECC environment.

Yours sincerely,

Teddy.

(Our reference SR-521516)

entry.title: Need correct path to update OT document number field in asset master data
entry.content: I'm looking for a solution for mass updat the OT number field in asset master data in order to generate SAF-T report properly but can't find the correct api or communicatio scenario please help

entry.title: Integration of SAP public cloud system with DATEV
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are currently using SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition) for our business operations in Germany. We are looking to automate the extraction of GL data from SAP into a DATEV-compliant format (CSV/ASCII) and would like to know if there is a direct integration available to fulfill the following requirements:
 
- Chart of Accounts (CoA): Mapping our internal SAP CoA to the German SKR03 or SKR04 standards.
- Tax Keys: Translating SAP tax codes to DATEV-specific tax keys (Steuerschlüssel).
- Cost Centers: Mapping cost center data to DATEV Kostenstellen.
 
Could you please confirm if a native integration or standard solution exists within the SAP Public Cloud for this purpose?
 
Thanks
Naveen

entry.title: Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation recalculates On‑Account (Special G/L A) balances
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud with Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation (Advanced FCV) active.
We would like to seek clarification and possible standard solution (if any) for the below scenario.

Business Scenario

Our business processes vendor transactions in two distinct ways:

  1. Vendor Invoices (Open Items)

    • Standard vendor invoices (RE / KR)
    • Business requirement: Foreign Currency Valuation should apply

  2. On‑Account / Advance Payments

    • Vendor advances posted using Special G/L Indicator “A”
    • These are payments without any reference to invoices
    • Business requirement: Foreign Currency Valuation should NOT apply

C

entry.title: FB03 Alternative in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Our client, coming from another SAP ERP system, uses transaction FB03 to obtain a list of purchase and sales documents for review before submitting them to the SII (Spain). In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, FB03 does not exist, so I would like to know:

  • Which standard apps do you recommend to obtain a similar document list?

  • What is the best practice to review FI documents before sending them to the SII?

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: #CoE#TAIT What functionality is available to synchronize system time and Mobile App time?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have one query from customer regarding the mobile/tablet (Maintenance Assitant App):

What functionality is available to synchronize system time and Mobile App time? App clock/calendar appears to be on UTC.

Best Regards

David

entry.title: #CoE#TAIT What functionality is available in the SAP maintenance assistant app for technicians?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have one query from customer regarding the mobile/tablet (Maintenance Assitant App):

What functionality is available in the SAP maintenance assistant app for technicians to update or adjust components in a maintenance order before confirmation?

Best Regards

David

entry.title: #CoE#TAIT What functionality is available in Mobile App (Maintenance Assitant App)?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have one query from customer regarding the mobile/tablet (Maintenance Assitant App):

Total time per person should be more than 24 hours in confirmation.

What drives the system to cap time confirmations at 24 hours when multiple technicians assigned per work center?

Best Regards

David

entry.title: Use of Custom CDS Entity YY1_PURCHASE Not Permitted in Development System
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to use a custom business object created via the Custom Business Object and Custom CDS View Fiori apps. A table has been generated, and I am attempting to use the corresponding CDS entity YY1_PURCHASE in my development (RAP) scenario.

However, I am getting the error:
“The use of CDS Entity YY1_PURCHASE is not permitted.”

Is it possible to use such custom CDS entities created via key user tools in RAP development? Or is there any restriction in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Please let me know if this is supported or not.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Adding Legacy Main Asset Number to Asset History Sheet (Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi Experts! I would like to ask, if it is possible to add the Legacy Main Asset Number field into the standard report (C_ASSETHISTORYSHEET) or the standard CDS view (I_AssetHistorySheetCube).

We are working on an SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition system, so we need a solution that allows us to enhance the standard application without accessing the backend or using traditional ABAP development. We specifically need this field to be visible and functional within the standard Asset History Sheet app.

Could you please advise on how to resolve this? I would greatly appreciate any guidance, suggestions, or alternative approaches.

Thank you very much for your help!

Best regards, Daniel Fedic

entry.title: Email Template not generating in Q-System after Software Collection Import
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue with a custom Email Template in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

I have created a custom template in our Development environment and moved it to the Quality system using the Export/Import Software Collections apps. While the template is visible in the "Maintain Email Templates" app in the Q-system, the emails are no longer generating for my business documents.

Could anyone point me toward which specific configuration or mapping is most commonly missed when transporting these objects via Software Collections? Is there a specific activation step required in the Q-system after the import?

Thanks in advance for your help.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Stock replication trigger behavior in SAP_COM_0447
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are evaluating the SAP_COM_0447 – Material Stock Quantity Replication scenario in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Our requirement is to send stock updates to an external system whenever there is a stock change (e.g. goods receipt, goods issue, transfer posting).

However, based on our understanding and initial tests:

  • The service seems to work as an asynchronous replication (snapshot-based) rather than event-driven
  • After a goods movement (e.g. GR), the outbound service is not triggered immediately

    We would like to clarify:

    1. Does SAP_COM_0447 automatically trigger for every stock movement?
    2. Is there any standard way to trigger replication on stock change (event-based)?
    3. What is the recommended approach if near real-time stock updates are required?

      Any insights or project experiences would be appreciated.

      Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Serial Number obligatory material cannot be updated error in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Why do we receive the Error "Serial number obligatory material cannot be updated" When using Confirm Production Order app in S/4HANA Public Cloud
